prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 8753→7225→14698→15077→8451，2023 年因广西首次新高考改革出现大幅后移，2024 年继续后移，2025 年大幅回弹至 8451，近两年波动剧烈；2025 年基准约 8451 名；本省理科（物理类）计划 2021–2023 年约 257–258 人，2024 年降至 250 人，2025 年回升至 258 人；2026 年计划 261 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 1.2%，扩招对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 54 名，近年排名在 48–55 名之间波动，整体处于全国中上游水平；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区不明巨型生物活动），可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 98（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，未出现明显报考热度升温信号；材料科学与工程（A）、交通运输工程（A-）、机械工程（A-），与该校理工类招生专业高度匹配，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年（约 38 万）增加约 3.2%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约 26.4 万，较 2025 年（26.0 万）增加约 1.5%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对广西考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在广西招生规模较大（物理类 260 人左右），属该校在省外的主要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅回弹后趋于稳定、2026 年计划小幅扩招约 1.2%、本省物理类考生增加约 1.5% 以及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招与考生增加效应基本对冲，声誉偏负面略抑制热度，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 8451 名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约 8540 名，区间 8040–9040 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 8753 → 7225 → 14698 → 15077 → 8451. In 2023, due to Guangxi's first new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant backward shift, continuing in 2024, with a substantial rebound to 8451 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The 2025 baseline is about 8451. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was approximately 257–258 from 2021 to 2023, dropping to 250 in 2024, and rebounding to 258 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 261, a slight expansion of about 1.2% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking around 54th in 2026, fluctuating between 48–55 in recent years, overall at the mid-to-upper level nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity at Nanhu Campus), which may mildly suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), short video exposure is relatively low, with no clear signs of rising application heat. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), Mechanical Engineering (A-), highly matching the university's engineering admissions majors, have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. The total number of Gaokao examinees in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% from 2025 (about 380,000). Estimated physics category examinees are about 264,000 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 1.5% from 2025 (260,000), intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Guangxi examinees. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Guangxi (about 260 physics category students), making it one of the main sources of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound and stabilization of rankings in 2025, a slight enrollment expansion of about 1.2% in 2026, an increase of about 1.5% in provincial physics category examinees, and a somewhat negative reputation, the effects of expansion and examinee increase largely offset each other, with the negative reputation slightly suppressing popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 8451. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8540, with a range of 8040–9040.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8040–9040, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 8040), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 9000), you should primarily rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1720→1889→1794→2541→2552. In 2024, due to Guangxi's first new college entrance exam reform, there was a noticeable backward shift (about 2541st place), and in 2025 it remained basically stable (2552nd place), with the last two years trending toward stability; the 2025 baseline is about 2552nd place; the provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 21 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 28 in 2024, and to 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30 students, a continued slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, with three consecutive years of expansion providing some relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, about 54th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48th and 55th, overall at the mid-to-upper level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may slightly suppress application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with no clear signal of rising application heat; Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), Mechanical Engineering (A-), primarily science and engineering, with no directly corresponding A-level disciplines supporting liberal arts majors, making liberal arts appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Economics is stable; the total number of Gaokao examinees in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated 123,000 history category examinees based on historical proportions, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (119,000), with the expanded examinee pool intensifying competition; Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Guangxi examinees; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Guangxi is small (about 30 students), making it a secondary source of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the stabilization of rankings in 2024–2025, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 plan by about 3.4%, the increase in provincial history category examinees by about 3.3%, and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion and examinee increase roughly offset each other, while the negative reputation slightly suppresses heat; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2552nd place; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2625th place, with a range of 2152–3098.
